TrialBalanceReportWriter - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.reports
TrialBalanceReportWriter generates a trial balance report as an Excel file.

Constructs a TrialBalanceReportWriter with the given TrialBalanceService and Ledger.
TrialBalanceResult - Class in core
TrialBalanceResult computes a ledgerâ€™s trial balance by aggregating the raw balances of all accounts.

Constructor TrialBalanceResult

Constructs a TrialBalanceResult from the given set of accounts.
TrialBalanceResultIntf - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.service
TrialBalanceResultIntf is a concrete implementation representing the results of a trial balance computation.
TrialBalanceResultIntf - Interface in nonprofitbookkeeping.interfaces
TrialBalanceResultIntf defines the contract for a trial balance result.
